Instruments

A world of opportunities

Discover CFDs on the world’s most popular financial instruments and get free real-time quotes to explore endless trading opportunities

Embrace the future with Cryptocurrencies

Buy & sell CFDs on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and 60+ other Cryptocurrencies at your fingertips.

Embrace the future with Stocks

Buy & sell CFDs on world-leading Stocks, enjoy zero fees and fractional shares.

Embrace the future with Commodities

Buy & sell CFDs on Commodities such as Oil, Gold, Silver, and more using our cutting-edge technology.

Start trading

Embrace the future with Forex

Buy & sell CFDs on Forex pairs such as EUR/USD, GBP/USD, EUR/GBP, and more using our economic calendar to keep up to date on important events.

Start trading
Learn more about Forex

Embrace the future with Indices

Buy & sell CFDs on Indices such as S&P 500 (ES), NASDAQ 100 (NQ), FTSE 100 (UK100), and more world-class Indices using our ultra-competitive quotes.

Start trading
Learn more about Indices

About us

Your interests are the center

Everything we do, from our continuous investment in R&D to the ongoing expansion of our product offering to our customers.

Learn more about us

Protected & secure

Funds and personal data protected with sophisticated cutting-edge security systems and encrypted databases.

Reliable

We're always on hand to help – and 99.99% of all trades are executed by our industry-leading trading technology.

Risk managment

Top balance protection strategies, 24/7 monitoring and risk management tools.

Professional support

Get dedicated customer support service in multiple languages.

platforms

Trade Anywhere Anytime

Discover CFDs on the world’s most popular financial instruments and get free real-time quotes to explore endless trading opportunities

Mobile app makes online trading available everywhere

Our patented app allows you to easily trade on the go and stay up-to-date with the markets.

Learn more about Mobile App

MT5 for professional market analysis

METATRADER5 comes with remarkable trading possibilities and top-notch technologies for successful trading on various financial markets and its derivatives.

Start trading
Learn more about MT5

WebTrader makes online trading simpler

This innovative platform is designed keeping in mind the newbie traders. WebTrader is very flexible and is widely popular for its easy-to-use feature. Users can access WebTrader from anywhere in the world through any browser and operating system.

Start trading
Learn more about WebTrader

START TRADING WITH A LEADING REGULATED BROKER

Welcome to Changexcapital, your premier destination for financial market algorithm. Based in Greater London, England, we offer a wide range of services tailored to meet your specific needs. With our expert team of professionals, we provide comprehensive insights and strategies to navigate the complexities of the financial market, ensuring your success in today's dynamic business landscape. Trust Changexcapital to guide you towards profitable opportunities and secure your financial future.

Account Types

Bronze Account

Entry-Level Excellence

$250

Welcome Bonus:

25%

Access to Basic Market Analytics

Standard Customer Support

Weekly Market Reports

User-Friendly Interface

The Bronze Account is designed for beginners, offering essential tools and resources to embark on your trading journey. With a modest deposit, you gain access to fundamental market insights and a user-friendly interface.

Discover

Silver Account

Enhanced Opportunities

$10,000

Welcome Bonus:

50%

Advanced Market Analytics

Priority Customer Support

Daily Market Reports

Risk Management Tools

Educational Webinars

Elevate your trading experience with the Silver Account, offering advanced market analytics and priority customer support. Benefit from daily market reports and educational webinars to refine your strategies.

Discover

Gold Account

Premium Experience

$50,000

Welcome Bonus:

75%

Exclusive Market Insights

Dedicated Account Manager

Daily Market Analysis

Customized Trading Strategies

Priority Withdrawals

Immerse yourself in a premium trading experience with the Gold Account. Enjoy exclusive market insights, a dedicated account manager, and customized trading strategies tailored to your goals.

Discover

Platinum Account

Elite Trader's Haven

$100,000

Welcome Bonus:

100%

VIP Access to Market Insights

24/7 Dedicated Support

Personalized Trading Plan

Priority Access to New Features

Exclusive Invitations to Events

For elite traders, the Platinum Account offers unparalleled benefits, including VIP access to market insights, 24/7 dedicated support, a personalized trading plan, and exclusive invitations to events. Unlock the full potential of your trading endeavors with our highest-tier account.
